ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "roster_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of leagues in which the player is rostered */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team for the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team for the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league commissioner */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "salary_cap" INTEGER /* Salary cap for the league */,
  "roster_size" INTEGER /* Number of players on each team's roster */,
  "playoff_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the playoffs */,
  "regular_season_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks in the regular season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owner */,
  "record" TEXT /* Record of the team (e.g., 5-3) */,
  "points_for" REAL /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" REAL /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "salary_remaining" INTEGER /* Remaining salary cap for the team */,
  "roster_full" INTEGER /* Whether the team's roster is full */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, bench, injured) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the player's contract */,
  "contract_value" INTEGER /* Value of the player's contract */,
  "year_signed" INTEGER /* Year the player signed the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., add, drop) */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the transfer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "team_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first team involved in the trade */,
  "team_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second team involved in the trade */,
  "player_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the player from the first team */,
  "player_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the player from the second team */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Additional details of the trade (e.g., draft picks exchanged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("player_id_2") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_1") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_2") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("player_id_1") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, commissioner, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "points_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy points entry */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("points_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., free agent, rostered, injured) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_availability_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_availability_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., scoring system, roster limit) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_settings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, recovering, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "suspension_type" TEXT /* Type of suspension */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension started */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension (e.g., number of games) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
